2605.29299.title: Pocket-Dentist: On-Device Dental Image Understanding via Efficient Multimodal Large Language Models
2605.29299.paper_summary: Evaluations of dental vision-language models remain fragmented across datasets, task definitions and metrics, and often ignore their computational cost. This limits their widespread deployment for dental screening outside specialist centres, where timely inference, limited hardware, and local handling of patient images are vital for practical, privacy-preserving clinical prescreening. Here we present Pocket-Dentist, an efficiency-aware benchmark for dental multimodal question answering that brings together three datasets spanning approximately 1,159 patients, five task types and seven metrics. Across typical 14 VLMs, our results reveals an interesting observation: compact VLMs (e.g., 2B-parameter models) outperform larger VLMs in accuracy while requiring substantially lower computational costs in dental image understanding. Deployed locally on an iPhone 17 Pro, our finetuned compact VLM Pocket-Dentist-2B processed each sample in 4.31 s, reducing latency by 4.9-fold and memory use by 2.3-fold compared with a 7B baseline.
2605.29299.paper_summary_zh: 牙科視覺-語言模型的評估在數據集、任務定義和指標之間仍然是支離破碎的，並且經常忽略它們的計算成本。這限制了它們在專科中心以外的牙科篩查的廣泛應用，在這些地方，及時推斷、有限的硬體和對患者影像的本地處理對於實用的、保護隱私的臨床預篩查至關重要。在這裡，我們提出了Pocket-Dentist，一個關注效率的牙科多模態問答基準，整合了大約1,159名患者的三個數據集、五種任務類型和七個指標。在典型的14個VLM中，我們的結果揭示了一個有趣的觀察：緊湊型VLM（例如，2B參數模型）在準確性上超越了較大的VLM，同時在牙科影像理解中需要顯著較低的計算成本。我們的微調緊湊型VLM Pocket-Dentist-2B在iPhone 17 Pro上本地部署，每個樣本的處理時間為4.31秒，與7B基準相比，延遲減少了4.9倍，內存使用減少了2.3倍。
2605.29299.author: Kai Bian et.al.
2605.29299.authors: Kai Bian, Xucheng Guo, Bin Chen, Lingyan Ruan, Yiran Shen, Ting Dang, Hong Jia
